description_long: This object is a roadside traffic sign consisting of a yellow diamond-shaped warning sign mounted above a rectangular speed limit sign, both attached to a single vertical black post. The upper sign features a black winding road symbol, indicating a curvy road ahead, while the lower sign displays '60 km/h' in bold black text, specifying the maximum speed limit. The signs are made of metal with a reflective yellow coating for visibility, and the post appears to be a sturdy, round metal pole. The rear of the signs is plain and dark, lacking any markings or text. The construction is typical of regulatory and warning signs found in urban and suburban environments. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing visibility and durability for outdoor roadside use.
description: A yellow curvy road warning sign above a rectangular 60 km/h speed limit sign, both mounted on a black metal pole. The signs are reflective and designed for roadside visibility.
description_view_0: A narrow side profile showing the thinness of the sign and post, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: The front view displays the yellow curvy road warning sign above the rectangular 60 km/h speed limit sign, both clearly visible and mounted on a black post.
description_view_2: Another side profile, similar to view 0, showing the slim edge of the sign and post.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the plain, dark backs of both signs and the supporting post, with no visible markings.
